title: Set Up NativeWind v4 (Tailwind CSS for Expo / React Native)
summary: Add NativeWind v4 to an Expo project — configure Metro, import global CSS, and use Tailwind `className` props on all React Native components.
declaration: I will set up NativeWind v4 in this Expo project to enable Tailwind CSS utility classes on React Native components. This includes installing packages, configuring Metro and Babel, creating the global CSS file, and updating the root layout. I will NOT use inline StyleSheet.create or the NativeWind v2 API — NativeWind v4 has a different configuration.
